---
name: Feature request / UX friction
about: Something works, but is unintuitive, surprising, or missing
title: "[feat] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## The friction

<!--
One paragraph: what you tried to do, what got in the way. UX friction
(confusing label, surprising default, missing flag) belongs here even
if nothing is technically broken.
-->

## What you tried

<!--
Workarounds, neighbouring commands you tried, related issues you
already saw. Helps us tell "missing feature" apart from "feature
exists but discoverability is bad".
-->

## Proposed direction

<!--
One or more concrete shapes for the fix. CLI flag names, output
changes, alternative wording — anything is fine. Multiple options
are welcome; we want to see the trade-off you saw.
-->

## Why this matters

<!--
How often this comes up for you, who else is likely to hit it.
"Once, but it cost me 20 minutes" is useful; "Every time I run X"
is more useful. Be honest about scope.
-->

## Environment (optional)

- `basou --version`:
- OS (macOS / Linux + version):
